subcodes.first_line: O servant of the True One! Your letter was received and its contents brought joy. I beseech God that always [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه تو رسید و از مضمون بهجت حاصل گردید از خدا خواهم که همواره
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
